script.text_block: The computers on the <yellow>Voyager 1 spacecraft</yellow> possess only sixty-nine kilobytes of memory. That is hundreds of thousands of times less capacity than a <red>standard car key fob</red> today.
script.title: Voyager 1's Small Memory

script.yt_search_query: supercomputer server room flashing led lights
script.text_block: The ENIAC, completed in <yellow>nineteen forty-five</yellow>, was the first programmable electronic computer. It weighed over <red>twenty-seven tons</red> and took up an entire basement room.
script.title: The 27-Ton Computer

script.yt_search_query: google search engine logo glowing screen
script.text_block: In twenty-fifteen, a former Google employee managed to buy the domain <yellow>Google.com for just twelve dollars</yellow> because of a registry glitch. He owned it for exactly <red>one minute.</red>
script.title: Google Bought For $12
